code_source.note: No LICENSE file was visible at this commit; this companion reimplements only the released statistical procedures and attributes them explicitly.

limitations: Subtracting the baseline pseudo-null expectation is a noise correction, not an unbiased non-null effect estimator.
Split WTD is unbiased for a noisy-selected set and may miss the oracle latent tail.
Absolute loss tail and WTD answer different questions and aren't combined.
The released QA benchmarks don't instantiate the manuscript's ten CHC-style domains.
Public dataset metadata exposed no license at pinning time; the cache is excluded from version control.
No model generations, graders, deployment outcomes, or external validity targets are added.
